title: Senior Supply Chain Specialist (Pharmaceutical/ FMCG)
description:
Job Description:

  • Provide support for both local and international sourcing of pharmaceutical products, including health supplements, skincare, and personal care items.
  • Identify, assess, and onboard suppliers; obtain quotations, negotiate costs, and maintain an approved vendor database.
  • Prepare and issue purchase orders, ensuring correctness of pricing, quantities, and delivery terms.
  • Liaise with suppliers to ensure on-time deliveries and adherence to quality and regulatory requirements.
  • Manage inbound and outbound inventory activities, including goods receipt, verification, and system updates.
  • Track inventory levels, expiry dates, and batch/lot numbers to ensure proper stock rotation and timely replenishment.
  • Perform regular cycle counts and investigate and reconcile inventory variances.
  • Ensure inventory records align with internal SOPs and applicable regulatory standards.
  • Arrange local and international shipments, including preparation of import and export documentation.
  • Coordinate with freight forwarders, customs agents, and logistics service providers.
  • Monitor shipment progress and resolve logistics issues to achieve on-time delivery.
  • Ensure compliance with cold-chain management and special handling requirements for pharmaceutical products.
  • Process sales orders, delivery notes, and invoices accurately and within required timelines.
  • Coordinate order picking, packing, and dispatch while safeguarding product quality and integrity.
  • Assist in preparing quotations and communicate with customers regarding order status and delivery updates.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Supply Chain Management, Logistics, Business Administration or any related fields.
  • Minimum 3–5 years of experience in procurement, logistics, or supply chain roles.
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills

Interested applicants for the above advertised position(s), please kindly email an updated copy of your resume to: gs1@talenttradersg.com;


EA License No.: 13C6305

Registration No.: R23117856 CHOE KIN MUN


For candidate who applied for the advertised position is deemed to have consented to us that we may collect, use or disclose your personal information for purpose in connection with the services provided by us.
